title: Test Writer
description: Write tests for existing code. Covers happy paths, edge cases, and error conditions.
workflowHints: Read the implementation before writing tests.
Cover happy path first, then edge cases, then error conditions.
Use the project's existing test framework and patterns.
retrievalHints: Find existing test files to match the project's test patterns.
Search for the module's public API and exported functions.
outputPolicy: List what is tested and what is not yet covered.
Run the new tests and report results.
